version_description: Piano accompaniment chords. Original doesn't really have any accompaniment but it's fun to play with an instrument backing too.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
It's all because of you, I'm feeling sad and blue[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7/A[/ch]    [ch]Edim[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]
You went away, now my life is just a rainy day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Aadd9[/ch]   [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]Bbdim[/ch]    [ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
And I love you so, how much you'll never know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]          [ch]A7/C#[/ch]
You've gone away and left me lonely[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
Untouchable memories, seem to keep haunting me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7/A[/ch]      [ch]Ebdim[/ch]
Of a love so true[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]    [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]
That it once turned all my gray skies blue[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Aadd9[/ch]
But you disappeared[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]Bbdim[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Now my eyes are filled with tears[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm wishing you were here with me[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]       [ch]D7[/ch]
Soaked with love are my thoughts of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
Now that you're gone, I just don't know what to do[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
If only you were here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
You'd wash away my tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7/A[/ch]        [ch]Ebdim[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
The sun would shine and once again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]
You'd be mine all mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Aadd9[/ch]       [ch]Aadd9[/ch]   [ch]Bbdim[/ch]  [ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
But in reality, you and I will never be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause you took your love away from me[/tab]

[speech]
N.C.
Girl, I don't know what I did
N.C.
To make you leave me but what I do know
N.C.
Is that since you've been gone
N.C.
There's such an emptiness inside
N.C.
I'm wishing you'd come back to me

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
If only you were here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
You'd wash away my tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7/A[/ch]        [ch]Ebdim[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
The sun would shine and once again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]   [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]
You'd be mine all mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Aadd9[/ch]       [ch]Aadd9[/ch]   [ch]Bbdim[/ch]  [ch]Bmadd9[/ch]
But in reality, you and I will never be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus4/G[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2/A[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause you took your love away from me[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, baby, you took your love away from me[/tab]
